passageTemplate:
Dear Mr. Henderson,

I am writing to formally request a two-week extension for the Sentinel Platform integration project, which is currently scheduled for delivery on May 15. As you are aware, the third-party API documentation we (1)___ on for the payment gateway module was updated without prior notice last week, rendering a significant portion of our existing codebase incompatible.

Our development team has been working overtime to refactor the affected modules, and I am confident that the additional time will allow us not only to resolve the compatibility issues but also to (2)___ more rigorous testing protocols that were originally planned for the post-launch phase. The revised timeline would push the go-live date to May 29.

I understand that any delay impacts the broader product roadmap, and I do not make this request (3)___. We have already notified the stakeholders of the downstream teams and have prepared a mitigation plan to minimize disruption.

(4)___ at your earliest convenience so that we can adjust the resource allocation accordingly.

Best regards,
Project Lead

blanks.explanation: 現在完成進行式表示從過去持續到現在仍倚賴該文件，強調連續性與近期影響。
to resolve...and (to) incorporate，省略to的不定詞並列結構。
副詞lightly修飾make，do not make...lightly表示非輕率決定。
I would appreciate...為商務email請求授權的禮貌句型，語氣恰當且正式。

passageTemplate:
To: All Department Directors
From: Customer Experience Division

I am pleased to share the key findings from our annual customer satisfaction survey, which achieved a response rate of 38% — the highest in the company's history. The overall satisfaction score rose to 84.2 out of 100, representing a 6.8-point improvement (1)___ last year's figure of 77.4. This upward trend is particularly encouraging given the operational disruptions we experienced during the first quarter.

However, the survey also identified several areas (2)___ immediate attention. Response times for technical support inquiries averaged 4.7 hours, well above the industry benchmark of 2.5 hours. Additionally, 23% of respondents indicated that the self-service portal was difficult to navigate, a figure that has remained largely (3)___ over the past three survey cycles.

I have scheduled a cross-functional workshop for next Tuesday to develop targeted action plans addressing each of these concerns. (4)___ as your insights will be instrumental in shaping the remedial measures we propose.

Thank you for your commitment to continuous improvement.

blanks.explanation: an X improvement over Y為固定搭配，表示相較於Y的進步幅度。
現在分詞requiring修飾areas，areas requiring attention = 需要注意的領域。
remain + 形容詞unchanged表示保持不變的狀態。
直接呼籲式句型語氣有力且具個人感，後接as說明理由。

passageTemplate:
Dear Valued Clients and Partners,

We are delighted to announce the opening of our newest regional office in Brisbane, Australia, marking our first direct presence in the Oceania market. This expansion is a direct response to the growing demand for our services in the region, (1)___ has seen a 67% increase in client inquiries over the past 18 months.

The Brisbane office will be headed by Ms. Sarah Chen, who brings over 20 years of industry experience and was previously the managing director of our Singapore operations. She will be supported by a team of 15 locally recruited professionals, all of whom have undergone our (2)___ six-month onboarding and training program.

To celebrate this milestone, we will be hosting an inaugural networking reception at the Brisbane Convention Centre on July 18. The event will feature a keynote address by our CEO and a panel discussion on emerging market opportunities in the Asia-Pacific region.

(3)___ the reception, please RSVP through the online registration portal by July 4. Due to venue capacity constraints, we regret that attendance will be limited to 200 guests.

(4)___ to this exciting new chapter in our company's growth story.

Warm regards,
Global Operations Director

blanks.explanation: which引導非限定關係子句指代demand（或前句整體），提供補充資訊。
形容詞rigorous（嚴格的）修飾training program，表示訓練的嚴謹程度。
If you wish to attend為條件子句，引導後續報名指示，語氣正式且清楚。

options: We look forward to welcoming you
blanks.answer: We look forward to welcoming you
blanks.explanation: look forward to + 動名詞為固定搭配，商務書信結尾標準用語。

passageTemplate:
Dear Mr. Kowalski,

Further to our telephone conversation on Tuesday, I am writing to confirm the revised payment terms for our supply agreement effective August 1. As agreed, the standard payment window will be extended from 30 to 45 days net, (1)___ that all invoices are submitted electronically through our procurement portal within five business days of delivery.

In exchange for the extended terms, we have agreed to a 2.5% price adjustment on all component orders placed during the first year of the renewed contract. This adjustment is intended to (2)___ your company for the additional working capital costs associated with the longer payment cycle. Subsequent years will be subject to annual review based on prevailing market conditions.

I have attached the amended contract for your review. (3)___ particular attention to Clause 7.3, which outlines the dispute resolution mechanism in the event of invoicing discrepancies. This clause was revised at the request of our legal department.

(4)___ and return a signed copy by August 15 to finalize the agreement.

Sincerely,
Procurement Manager

blanks.explanation: provided that（倘若）為條件連接詞，等同於on the condition that，正式合約用語。
intended to + 原形動詞compensate，表示「旨在補償」。
Please pay attention to為禮貌祈使句，催促對方注意特定條款。
Kindly sign...為商務書信中溫和而專業的請求語氣，符合合約簽署場景。

passageTemplate:
IMPORTANT: Office Relocation — Phase 1 Timeline

As part of our previously announced consolidation initiative, the Finance, Human Resources, and Legal departments will be relocating to the newly renovated North Tower on the 12th through 15th floors. The relocation will (1)___ in three phases to minimize disruption to daily operations.

Phase 1, which covers the Finance department, will commence on Monday, September 11, and is expected to be completed by Wednesday, September 13. During this period, all Finance staff members are required to work from home, (2)___ a skeleton crew of three senior accountants who will remain on-site at the current location to handle urgent payment processing.

To facilitate a smooth transition, each employee is responsible for packing their personal belongings and labeling all equipment with the (3)___ floor and workstation numbers by 5:00 p.m. on Friday, September 8. IT will handle the disconnection and reconnection of all desktop computers and telephones.

(4)___ regarding the relocation should be directed to the Facilities Management help desk at extension 4500. Detailed floor plans and workstation assignments have been distributed via email and are also available on the company intranet.

blanks.explanation: will be carried out為被動語態，搬遷「被執行」，符合will後接原形的規則。
except for + 名詞片語（a skeleton crew）為排除用法，表示除少數人外全體遠距。
過去分詞assigned修飾floor and workstation numbers，表示「已被分配的」。
Any questions作主詞為公告常見開頭，直接正式且符合公司內部通訊風格。

passageTemplate:
Elevate Your Career with Negotiation Mastery — Registration Now Open

In an era where cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management define professional success, the ability to negotiate effectively is no longer (1)___ to senior executives. Professionals at every level must be equipped to advocate for resources, align divergent interests, and reach mutually beneficial agreements.

Our two-day intensive workshop, led by Harvard-trained negotiation expert Dr. Amanda Reese, combines cutting-edge behavioral research with hands-on simulation exercises. Participants will engage in realistic multi-party negotiation scenarios and receive personalized feedback on their communication style, strategic thinking, and emotional intelligence under pressure. Unlike conventional seminars that (2)___ generic frameworks, our program is tailored to each participant's industry and functional role.

The workshop will be held at the Grand Hyatt Conference Center from October 20 to 21. Early-bird registration, which offers a 20% discount, closes on September 15. (3)___ organizations sending three or more participants are eligible for an additional 10% group discount.

(4)___ as spaces are strictly limited to 30 participants per session to ensure an optimal learning environment.

Visit our website or call (800) 555-0192 to register.

blanks.explanation: is confined to（侷限於）為被動語態固定搭配，表示不再僅限於高階主管。
that rely on，關係子句主詞seminars為複數，搭配原形動詞rely on。
In addition為連接副詞引導額外資訊，獨立逗號後接完整句。

options: We encourage you to secure your spot early
blanks.answer: We encourage you to secure your spot early
blanks.explanation: We encourage you to...為廣告中溫暖而有力的呼籲，as說明理由。

passageTemplate:
Dear Retail Partners,

This message constitutes formal notification of a voluntary product recall affecting the HeatChef Pro T-2000 portable induction cooktop, model numbers HC-2000 through HC-2099, manufactured between January and March of this year. An internal quality audit has revealed that, under rare circumstances, the temperature control module may malfunction, (1)___ the unit to overheat beyond safe operating limits.

We have already commenced the recall process and are coordinating with consumer safety authorities across all jurisdictions where the product was distributed. All affected units must be (2)___ from store shelves and online listings immediately. Customers who have purchased the product should be directed to our dedicated recall hotline at (800) 555-0347 for a full refund or replacement.

We fully recognize the (3)___ this recall places on your operations, particularly during the peak holiday shopping season. A compensation package for retail partners, including reimbursement for logistical costs and a goodwill credit toward future orders, will be detailed in a separate communication early next week.

(4)___ by replying to this email with your current inventory count of the affected model numbers by 5:00 p.m. this Friday.

Sincerely,
Quality Assurance Director

blanks.explanation: 現在分詞causing表示前句情況所導致的結果，為分詞構句。
must be + 過去分詞withdrawn構成被動語態，商品必須被下架。
名詞burden作為recognize的受詞，the burden this recall places為N + 關代子句結構。

options: Please confirm receipt of this notice
blanks.answer: Please confirm receipt of this notice
blanks.explanation: 祈使句Please confirm...為正式召回通知的行動呼籲，清楚直接。

passageTemplate:
To: All Department Directors and Budget Coordinators
From: Chief Financial Officer

As we approach the fiscal year-end on December 31, it is time to begin preparing departmental budget proposals for the upcoming year. The deadline for submission is October 20, which (1)___ for review and consolidation before the final budget must be presented to the board on November 15.

This year's budget planning will be governed by two overarching principles. First, all departments are expected to identify cost-saving opportunities of at least 5% relative to their current-year allocations, without (2)___ operational effectiveness or employee headcount. Second, any request for additional funding above a 3% increase over the current baseline must be accompanied by a detailed business case demonstrating a projected return on investment within 18 months.

The finance department will host two training sessions on the new budget preparation software on September 8 and September 12. (3)___ is mandatory for all first-time budget coordinators and strongly recommended for those who have not used the platform in the past 12 months.

(4)___ your proposals are submitted by the deadline, the finance team will provide preliminary feedback within five business days and schedule one-on-one review meetings where adjustments are necessary.

Thank you for your cooperation.

blanks.explanation: which allows，關係子句指代deadline（單數），動詞需用第三人稱單數。
without + 動名詞compromising（損害），介係詞後接動名詞為固定用法。
名詞Attendance作主詞最直接，表示參加這件事本身為強制性的。
Provided that（倘若）為條件連接詞，提出預算準時提交後的回饋承諾，符合商務規劃語境。

passageTemplate:
Dear Colleagues,

We are excited to introduce Thrive360, a comprehensive employee wellness program designed to support your physical, mental, and financial well-being. This initiative, (1)___ development involved input from over 300 employees through focus groups and surveys conducted last fall, will officially launch on April 1.

Thrive360 encompasses four core components: subsidized gym memberships at over 2,000 participating fitness centers nationwide, confidential mental health counseling services available 24/7 via a dedicated hotline, quarterly financial literacy workshops led by certified planners, and an enhanced Employee Assistance Program that extends coverage to immediate family members. Each component has been carefully curated to address the most frequently cited challenges identified in our annual engagement survey.

Enrollment in the program is voluntary and (2)___ no cost to full-time employees. Part-time staff members are eligible for a prorated subsidy covering 60% of the program costs. We strongly encourage everyone to (3)___ of these resources, as research consistently shows that employees who engage with wellness initiatives report higher job satisfaction and lower stress levels.

(4)___ a series of orientation webinars will be held during the last week of March. Registration details will be circulated separately.

We look forward to supporting your well-being journey.

Warm regards,
Chief Human Resources Officer

blanks.explanation: whose development = the development of which，表示該計畫的開發過程，所有格關係代名詞。
come at no cost（以零成本提供）為固定搭配，at表代價。
take advantage of為固定片語（善加利用），正式書面鼓勵用語。

options: To help you familiarize yourself with the program
blanks.answer: To help you familiarize yourself with the program
blanks.explanation: To + 原形不定詞表示目的，帶出後續行動安排，語氣溫暖且引導性強。

passageTemplate:
Dear Ms. Lindström,

I am writing to inform you that our shipment of medical diagnostic equipment (Order #SW-88492) has been detained at customs in Rotterdam due to a discrepancy in the certificate of origin documentation. Specifically, the harmonized system codes listed on the commercial invoice do not fully align with those on the packing list, (1)___ has triggered an automatic review by the Netherlands customs authority.

We have already engaged our local customs broker, Van Dijk Logistics, to liaise with the authorities and expedite the resolution. They estimate that (2)___ the necessary corrections to the documentation will take three to five business days. Once cleared, the shipment will be transported to your facility within 48 hours via priority ground service.

We sincerely apologize for this delay and any disruption it may cause to your operations. Our shipping department has initiated an internal review to determine how this discrepancy (3)___ and to implement additional verification checks to prevent similar incidents in the future.

(4)___ with daily updates as the situation progresses. Please do not hesitate to contact me directly if you require further information.

Sincerely,
Export Logistics Manager

blanks.explanation: which引導非限定關係子句指代前句整體所述情況，只能用which。
that making...為that + 動名詞片語作主詞子句的主詞，動名詞片語為名詞性質。
how this discrepancy occurred，過去式表示已經發生的差異事件，與事實時間相符。
I will provide you with...為主動承諾語氣，表達個人責任感，優於被動結構。

passageTemplate:
To: Executive Leadership Team
From: Market Intelligence Unit

Please find below the highlights from our third-quarter market share analysis across the three primary product categories. The data, (1)___ has been compiled from independent industry reports and our internal sales databases, reveals a mixed but generally encouraging picture.

In the enterprise software segment, our market share increased from 14.2% to 16.8%, the (2)___ gain recorded since the second quarter of 2022. This jump is largely attributable to the successful launch of our cloud-native platform and the withdrawal of a key competitor from the Asia-Pacific market. Conversely, the consumer electronics division experienced a marginal decline of 0.7 percentage points, which we attribute to aggressive pricing strategies employed by several emerging brands in the budget segment.

The most significant concern, however, lies in the professional services category, where our share has (3)___ eroded over four consecutive quarters, falling from 22.1% to 18.9%. I recommend that we commission an independent review of our service delivery model to identify the root causes before this trend becomes irreversible.

(4)___ a comprehensive discussion of these findings at the executive retreat scheduled for November 10.

Regards,
Director of Market Intelligence

blanks.explanation: which引導非限定關係子句，前後逗號隔開，指代data。
the + 最高級steepest（最大的）修飾gain，指自2022年Q2以來的最大增幅。
副詞steadily修飾動詞eroded，表示市佔率穩定地被侵蝕。
look forward to + 名詞/動名詞為固定搭配，商務備忘錄結尾標準表達。

passageTemplate:
MANDATORY CYBERSECURITY TRAINING — Completion Required by April 15

In response to a sharp rise in phishing attacks targeting organizations within our industry, the Information Security Office is launching a company-wide cybersecurity awareness campaign. All employees, (1)___ of their role or tenure, are required to complete the newly updated digital security training module by April 15.

The module, which takes approximately 45 minutes to complete, covers four critical areas: identifying sophisticated phishing attempts, creating and managing strong passwords, recognizing social engineering tactics, and responding appropriately to suspected security (2)___. A short assessment at the end of each section must be passed with a score of at least 80% to receive course credit.

Please note that failure to complete the training by the deadline will result in the temporary suspension of access to the company network, a measure that (3)___ regrettable but necessary in light of the escalating threat landscape. Compliance rates will be monitored by department and reported to the executive leadership team on a weekly basis.

(4)___ to answer any questions you may have about the training content or the compliance requirements.

Thank you for your cooperation in maintaining our collective digital safety.

blanks.explanation: regardless of（無論）為固定片語，表示不考慮職位或年資。
名詞breaches（違規事件）為複數形，與前文security搭配為資安事件。
副詞admittedly（誠然/不可否認地）修飾形容詞regrettable，插入語語氣。

options: The Information Security team is available
blanks.answer: The Information Security team is available
blanks.explanation: 完整主詞+動詞句子為常見公告結尾，提供後續支援管道。

passageTemplate:
Master Business English in 12 Weeks — Enroll Now for the Fall Cohort

In today's globalized economy, English proficiency is not merely an advantage (1)___ a prerequisite for career advancement. Professionals who can communicate with clarity and precision in international settings consistently outperform their peers in cross-border negotiations, client presentations, and executive meetings.

Our 12-week intensive program, developed in partnership with the London School of Business Communication, goes far beyond textbook grammar. Participants engage in simulated boardroom discussions, deliver presentations to native-speaker panels, and draft real-world business documents — from executive summaries and financial reports to persuasive proposals. Every session is led by instructors who (2)___ extensive experience coaching senior executives from Fortune 500 companies.

The program also includes a one-on-one accent and pronunciation assessment, which many of our alumni cite as the single most transformative component of the course. (3)___ graduates have reported a measurable improvement in their confidence when presenting in English, with 89% rating the program as "excellent" or "very good."

(4)___ as the fall cohort is limited to 28 participants and always fills months in advance. A limited number of partial scholarships are available for applicants from nonprofit organizations.

Visit www.bizenglishpro.com to submit your application.

blanks.explanation: not merely...but（不僅是...而是）為對等連接詞搭配，加強語氣。
who have extensive experience，關係子句主詞who指instructors（複數），動詞用have。
副詞Overwhelmingly（一面倒地/壓倒性地）修飾動詞have reported，表示極高比例。

options: We strongly recommend submitting your application early
blanks.answer: We strongly recommend submitting your application early
blanks.explanation: We strongly recommend + 動名詞為廣告中緊迫但專業的呼籲，as說明限額原因。

passageTitle: Email: Joint Venture Term Sheet Discussion
passageTemplate:
Dear Mr. Al-Rashid,

Thank you for the productive discussions we had during your visit to our headquarters last week. I believe we have reached a broad consensus on the principal terms of the proposed joint venture, and I am now in a position to share a preliminary term sheet for your review.

As discussed, the joint venture will be structured as a 51:49 equity split, with your company holding the majority stake and (1)___ primary responsibility for operational management. Our side will contribute the intellectual property portfolio, which has been independently valued at $3.8 million, and will (2)___ technical oversight of the research and development function.

One outstanding item that requires further negotiation is the governance structure. Specifically, we need to agree on the composition of the board of directors and the mechanism (3)___ which deadlock decisions will be resolved. I propose that we each nominate two directors and jointly appoint a fifth independent director with a casting vote.

(4)___ a conference call during the week of September 18 to work through the remaining details. Please let me know which days and times would be convenient for your team.

Warm regards,
Chief Strategy Officer

blanks.explanation: and (your company) assuming，現在分詞與holding並列，表示同時承擔。
and will retain，與前面will contribute並列，共用助動詞will。
the mechanism through which（透過該機制的途徑）為關係子句中介係詞的正確搭配。
I would like to propose...為商務email提議會議的標準禮貌表達。

passageTemplate:
Dear Employees and Stakeholders,

After 27 years of distinguished service, our founder and CEO, Mr. William Thornton, has informed the board of directors of his intention to retire effective December 31. In accordance with the succession plan that (1)___ in place since 2019, Ms. Elena Vasquez, currently Chief Operating Officer, will assume the role of Chief Executive Officer on January 1 of the coming year.

Ms. Vasquez joined the company 14 years ago as Director of Operations and has (2)___ held positions of increasing responsibility, including Vice President of Global Supply Chain and, most recently, COO. During her tenure as COO, she led the digital transformation initiative that reduced operating costs by 18% while simultaneously improving customer retention rates by 9 percentage points. The board's decision was unanimous and reflects our utmost confidence in her leadership capabilities.

To ensure a seamless transition, Mr. Thornton will serve as a strategic advisor to the board for a period of 12 months following his retirement. (3)___ he will remain available to provide counsel on key strategic decisions during this interim period.

(4)___ a town hall meeting on November 5, during which Mr. Thornton and Ms. Vasquez will jointly address the organization and answer questions.

Sincerely,
Chairman of the Board

blanks.explanation: has been in place since 2019表示從2019年開始至今持續存在的狀態，現在完成式。
副詞subsequently（隨後）修飾動詞held，表示之後逐步擔任各項職位。
In this capacity（以這個身份/職位）為固定介係詞搭配，表示以顧問身份提供建議。
We invite you to attend...為正式公告的邀請句型，溫暖且直接。

passageTemplate:
To: IT Infrastructure Team
From: Vice President of Operations

I have reviewed and approved the proposal to upgrade the server infrastructure at our Atlanta data center. The current hardware, which was deployed in the summer of 2018, has exceeded its recommended operational lifespan and is no longer (1)___ of supporting the increased data processing demands generated by our recent enterprise resource planning system implementation.

The approved budget of $240,000 covers the acquisition and installation of six next-generation blade servers, a redundant cooling system, and the necessary software licensing for the virtualization layer. I expect the procurement process to commence no later than October 5, with installation (2)___ for the first two weeks of November during the scheduled maintenance window.

Please coordinate closely with the Facilities department to ensure that the power and cooling infrastructure can accommodate the new equipment's specifications, (3)___ exceed those of the current setup by approximately 40%. Any additional facility upgrades required should be flagged immediately so that supplementary funding can be requested.

(4)___ on the project timeline and any obstacles encountered. I would rather be informed of potential delays early than be surprised later.

Regards,
VP Operations

blanks.explanation: is capable of + 動名詞為固定搭配，表示有能力做某事。
with installation scheduled for...為with + 名詞 + 過去分詞的附帶狀況結構。
which exceed...為非限定關係子句補充說明specifications，只能用which。
keep me apprised（隨時通知我）為商務正式用語，keep + 受詞 + 過去分詞。

passageTemplate:
Dear Ms. Gallagher,

I am writing with regard to Claim #CL-77821, which you submitted on August 12 in connection with the water damage sustained at your warehouse facility following the severe storm on August 5. After completing our on-site assessment and reviewing the supporting documentation you provided, I am pleased to confirm that your claim has been approved in the amount of $127,500.

The approved sum covers structural repairs to the affected section of the warehouse, replacement of damaged inventory, and compensation for business interruption losses (1)___ during the 11-day period when the facility was partially inoperable. The payment will be processed within five to seven business days and transferred directly to the bank account on file.

Please note that any additional expenses (2)___ during the repair process that were not included in the original estimate must be supported by itemized receipts and submitted as a supplementary claim. Our adjuster, Mr. David Park, remains your point of contact and can be (3)___ at extension 2407 should you have any questions.

(4)___ to confirm receipt of this notification once the funds have been deposited. It has been our privilege to assist you through this difficult period.

Sincerely,
Senior Claims Adjuster

blanks.explanation: 過去分詞incurred（已發生的）修飾losses，表示在停運期間已發生的損失。
現在分詞arising（產生的）修飾expenses，expenses arising during...為常見保險文件用語。
can be reached（可以被聯繫到）為被動語態固定表達。

options: We would appreciate it if you could
blanks.answer: We would appreciate it if you could
blanks.explanation: We would appreciate it if you could...為商務書信中極禮貌的請求模式，正式且不強硬。

passageTemplate:
To: All Department Heads
From: Director of Talent Development

Following the organizational resilience review conducted last quarter, the executive committee has mandated the implementation of a company-wide cross-training program designed to reduce the operational risk (1)___ with single points of failure in critical functions. Effective October 1, every employee in a mission-critical role will be required to identify and train at least one colleague who can perform their essential duties in the event of an unplanned absence.

The Talent Development team has prepared a structured framework to guide this process, (2)___ competency matrices for each department, standardized training templates, and assessment rubrics to verify proficiency. We will be conducting orientation sessions for all managers during the first week of October to walk through the implementation guidelines.

It should be emphasized that this initiative is not intended to create redundancy or (3)___ any employee's position. Rather, it is a strategic measure to enhance our collective resilience and provide staff with valuable professional development opportunities. Cross-training hours may be counted toward annual professional development requirements.

(4)___ each department's cross-training plan no later than October 31. The Talent Development team will review the submissions and provide customized feedback within two weeks.

Thank you for your support in building a more resilient organization.

blanks.explanation: risk associated with...為過去分詞片語修飾risk，等同於risk that is associated with...。
現在分詞including（包含）為固定用法，列舉框架內含的項目。
to create...or (to) undermine，省略to的不定詞並列，undermine意為削弱。
We ask that + 主詞 + 原形動詞（假設語氣省略should）為正式請求結構。

passageTemplate:
Dear Team,

I am extraordinarily proud to share that our company has been shortlisted as a finalist for the prestigious Global Innovation in Logistics Award, which recognizes organizations that have demonstrated (1)___ excellence in supply chain management. We were nominated specifically for our predictive inventory management system, which has reduced stockouts by 37% across our distribution network while cutting warehousing costs by $2.4 million annually.

The award ceremony will take place at the International Logistics Forum in Singapore on November 16. (2)___ we are selected as the winner, this would mark the third consecutive year that our logistics division has received industry recognition, a record that no competitor in our sector has yet matched.

The nomination itself is a testament to the collective expertise and dedication of everyone involved in the project, from the data science team that developed the forecasting algorithms (3)___ the warehouse staff who implemented the new picking and packing protocols on the ground. I encourage all of you to take a moment to reflect on this achievement with pride.

REVISED TRAVEL AND EXPENSE POLICY — Effective August 1

Following a comprehensive benchmarking review of travel expenditure across comparable organizations in our industry, the Finance department has revised the company's travel and expense policy. The revisions, which (1)___ to all domestic and international business travel, are designed to reduce annual travel expenditure by approximately 12% without compromising employee safety or comfort.

Employees (2)___ these policies will be required to cover any non-reimbursable expenses personally.

blanks.explanation: which apply to，關係代名詞which指revisions（複數），動詞用原形apply。
關係子句who fail to comply with修飾employees，fail to comply為正式政策用語。
Nevertheless（儘管如此）表達讓步轉折，先承認行政負擔再強調節省效果。

options: A complete copy of the revised policy
blanks.answer: A complete copy of the revised policy
blanks.explanation: A complete copy作主詞最直接清晰，為公告告知查閱方式的標準句式。
